## Test plan

- [ ] `pytest -v` passes locally
- [ ] Added or updated tests for the new behavior (or explained why none were needed)
- [ ] Ran the relevant example(s) end-to-end
- [ ] For C++ changes: rebuilt with `pip install -e .` and verified the extension loads

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking)
- [ ] Breaking change (please describe migration)
- [ ] Documentation / build only
- [ ] Refactor (no behavior change)
